mapper.select: select id, action_key, action_type, user_id, status, target_id, target_code, create_time, update_time from agent_automation_action where action_key = #{actionKey}
mapper.insert: insert into agent_automation_action(action_key, action_type, user_id, status, create_time, update_time) values (#{actionKey}, #{actionType}, #{userId}, #{status}, now(), now())
mapper.update: update agent_automation_action set status = 'COMPLETED', target_id = #{targetId}, target_code = #{targetCode}, update_time = now() where action_key = #{actionKey} and status = 'PROCESSING'
